name: Coconut & Tomato Braised Chickpeas
description: A warming winter braise with crispy tofu, deeply spiced and finished with fresh spinach and lemon.
method: Press tofu between paper towels for 10 minutes, then cut into 2cm cubes.
Heat olive oil in a large pan over high heat. Fry tofu until golden and crispy on all sides, about 8 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, sauté diced capsicum and zucchini for 3 minutes. Add garlic, ginger, cumin, smoked paprika and chilli flakes. Cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Add tomato paste and stir through. Pour in diced tomatoes and coconut milk. Bring to a simmer.
Add drained chickpeas. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes until sauce thickens.
Meanwhile, cook basmati rice per packet instructions.
Stir spinach through the braise until just wilted. Return crispy tofu to the pan.
Finish with a squeeze of lemon, season to taste. Serve over rice.
tips: Add more chilli if you like heat — this is mild as written.
Crispy tofu is key — don't skip the pressing step.
Leftovers taste even better the next day.
comments: Really good — add more chilli next time. Perfect winter meal.
